chapter_title.ar: باب الْأَمْرِ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَ النَّهْيِ عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – The Enjoining of the good and the Forbidding of the evil

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/405)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/405)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْأَمْرُ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَ النَّهْيُ عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ خَلْقَانِ مِنْ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ فَمَنْ نَصَرَهُمَا أَعَزَّهُ اللَّهُ وَ مَنْ خَذَلَهُمَا خَذَلَهُ اللَّهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Yaqoub Bin Yazeed, raising it, said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The enjoining of the good, and the forbidding from the evil are two creatures from the creatures of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>. So the one who helps these two, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Honour him, and the one who abandons these two, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Abandon him’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that Amir al-Mu 5 minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, had commanded us to meet sinful people with a frowning face . 555
